arts.ttl: Mathys Tel 'contact made' as Arsenal look for transfer solution after double striker blow
arts.sum: Arsenal have turned their attention to Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel and are in 'contact' with his camp ahead of a potential move before the end of the January transfer window, according to the latest reports. And now, Arsenal are looking to win the race to sign Tel. Having expressed his desire to leave Bayern earlier in January, Tel's future has been the centre of transfer debate at Bayern and the Gunners are in the race, alongside Manchester United and Chelsea, to sign him in the next 36 hours.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal are still in the hunt to sign ‘outstanding’ striker before deadline day

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta defends right to ‘respectful’ criticism of referees
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has defended his right to criticise refereeing decisions he does not agree with.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says Haaland will control his emotions as striker prepares to face Gabriel in Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says Erling Haaland will control his emotions as the striker prepares to face defender Gabriel again following last September’s heated clash.
